'''Vulp Minor''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Vulpter system/Legends|Vulpter system]] of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. The planet featured a [[Temperature/Legends|frozen]] environment, and its surface consisted of rock. Vulp Minor occupied the fifth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around its [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Vulpter (star)|Vulpter]], and it had three [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Wizards" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vulp Minor was mentioned in "[[Byss and the Deep Core]], Part 4: Vulpter," the fourth entry in the [[Planet Hoppers]] ''[[Byss and the Deep Core]]'' article series, written by [[Rodney Thompson]] and published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[April 28]], [[2005]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Vulpter [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Vulp Minor, in grid square L-10.<ref name="TEA" />
